Subject: Morning Metrics + Client Messages
Description: Check n8n execution logs for errors. Reply to any client messages. KPI: 0 unresolved errors.

Subject: Outreach: 5 Emails + 3 LinkedIn DMs
Description: Send 5 cold emails + 3 LinkedIn DMs from lead scraper data. KPI: 5 sent before 07:00. Log all contacts in Airtable CRM.

Subject: Prospect Follow-ups
Description: Reply to all prospect responses from morning outreach. Follow up on pending proposals. KPI: all replies within 24h.

Subject: Product Dev (Mon/Wed/Fri)
Description: Build features, fix workflows, improve client delivery. KPI: 1 improvement shipped per session.

Subject: Content Creation (Tue/Thu)
Description: Write LinkedIn post, create short video, or draft blog content. KPI: 1 piece of content created.

Subject: Saturday: Weekly Metrics Review + Pipeline
Description: Review MRR vs target. Check leads generated, outreach stats, Google Ads CPA. Update pipeline - every deal must have a next action. Kill stale deals (3+ follow-ups no reply).

Subject: Saturday: Strategy Calls + Proposals
Description: Conduct strategy calls with prospects (all calls booked for Saturday). Send proposals. KPI: 2-3 calls conducted.

Subject: Saturday: Client Onboarding / Product Dev
Description: Onboard new clients (activate workflows, configure Airtable). Or build next product feature. KPI: 1 deliverable shipped.

Subject: Saturday: Deep Work - Features / Fix Scripts
Description: Deep focus: build new automation features, write fix scripts, expand lead scraper areas. KPI: 1 major improvement.

Subject: Sunday: Batch Content Creation
Description: Create 5 LinkedIn posts for the week + 1 longer article or case study. Schedule all posts. KPI: full week of content queued.

Subject: Sunday: Product Dev / Workflow Fixes
Description: Fix workflow errors from the week. Build automation improvements. Reduce backlog. KPI: backlog items reduced.

Subject: Sunday: Week Planning + CRM Cleanup
Description: Plan next week's priorities: 3 must-do, 3 should-do, 1 experiment. Clean up CRM pipeline. KPI: every deal has next action.

Subject: Thursday: Google Ads Optimization
Description: Review Google Ads CPA, adjust bids, pause underperforming keywords. KPI: CPA reviewed and optimized.

Subject: Month-End Review + Planning
Description: Full month review: MRR, client count, churn, pipeline, ads ROI. Plan next month priorities. Update revenue projections.

Subject: Mid-Month Revenue Check
Description: Check revenue vs monthly target. Adjust strategy if behind. Review pipeline for quick wins.
